components.name: xml-apis
components.description: xml-commons provides an Apache-hosted set of DOM, SAX, and JAXP interfaces for use in other xml-based projects. Our hope is that we can standardize on both a common version and packaging scheme for these critical XML standards interfaces to make the lives of both our developers and users easier. The External Components portion of xml-commons contains interfaces that are defined by external standards organizations. For DOM, that's the W3C; for SAX it's David Megginson and sax.sourceforge.net; for JAXP it's Sun.

components.name: fontbox
components.description: The Apache FontBox library is an open source Java tool to obtain low level information from font files. FontBox is a subproject of Apache PDFBox.

components.name: junit-platform-native
components.description: JUnit Platform support for GraalVM Native Image

components.name: mockito-core
components.description: Mockito mock objects library core API and implementation

components.name: xmlgraphics-commons
components.description: Apache XML Graphics Commons is a library that consists of several reusable components used by Apache Batik and Apache FOP. Many of these components can easily be used separately outside the domains of SVG and XSL-FO.

components.name: assertj-core
components.description: Rich and fluent assertions for testing in Java

components.name: commons-logging
components.description: Apache Commons Logging is a thin adapter allowing configurable bridging to other, well-known logging systems.

components.name: xml-apis-ext
components.description: xml-commons provides an Apache-hosted set of DOM, SAX, and JAXP interfaces for use in other xml-based projects. Our hope is that we can standardize on both a common version and packaging scheme for these critical XML standards interfaces to make the lives of both our developers and users easier. The External Components portion of xml-commons contains interfaces that are defined by external standards organizations. For DOM, that's the W3C; for SAX it's David Megginson and sax.sourceforge.net; for JAXP it's Sun.

components.name: pdfbox
components.description: The Apache PDFBox library is an open source Java tool for working with PDF documents.

components.name: pdfbox-io
components.description: The Apache PDFBox library is an open source Java tool for working with PDF documents. This artefact contains IO related classes.

components.name: byte-buddy
components.description: Byte Buddy is a Java library for creating Java classes at run time. This artifact is a build of Byte Buddy with all ASM dependencies repackaged into its own name space.

components.name: opentest4j
components.description: Open Test Alliance for the JVM

components.name: commons-io
components.description: The Apache Commons IO library contains utility classes, stream implementations, file filters, file comparators, endian transformation classes, and much more.

components.name: objenesis
components.description: A library for instantiating Java objects

components.name: picocli
components.description: Java command line parser with both an annotations API and a programmatic API. Usage help with ANSI styles and colors. Autocomplete. Nested subcommands. Easily included as source to avoid adding a dependency.

components.name: byte-buddy-agent
components.description: The Byte Buddy agent offers convenience for attaching an agent to the local or a remote VM.

components.name: picocli-codegen
components.description: Picocli Code Generation - Tools to generate documentation, configuration, source code and other files from a picocli model.

components.name: lanterna
components.description: Java library for creating text-based terminal GUIs
